_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Antriksh Forest
project.address: Plot No. GH-03C, Sector 77, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.description: A spacious, low-density ready-to-move housing society in Sector 77, Noida, spread across 7.5 acres with 80% open spaces.
project.long_description: Antriksh Forest in Sector 77 is a sprawling, ready-to-move-in residential community that has matured into a green oasis within Noida's central residential corridor. Spanning approximately 7.5 acres with an impressive 80% dedicated to parks, landscape reserves, and common areas, the project stands out for its low project density of just 82 units per acre. Developed by the veteran Antriksh Group, the society rises G+21 floors across 13 towers, housing a total of 618 apartments. Uniquely engineered to offer wellness-centric layouts, the project features dedicated towers optimized for medical professionals with integrated clinic provisions. Blessed with a strategic location directly adjacent to Noida's massive 50-acre master city park, the society enjoys superior air quality, lower local temperatures, and spectacular unobstructed views, offering high value for end-users seeking tranquility.
marketing_claims: Low-density living with only 82 units per acre
Adjacent to Noida's massive 50-acre city park
Special dedicated towers for medical practitioners with personal clinics
80% open landscaped parks and green belts
Completely occupied ready-to-move-in society with active registries

builder.name: The Antriksh Group
builder.company_overview: The Antriksh Group (Antriksh Realtech Private Limited) is one of the premier and oldest real estate developers in northern India, boasting an operational legacy since 1986. Over nearly four decades, the group has successfully delivered more than 50 housing societies, commercial landmarks, and multi-acre townships across Delhi NCR, Rajasthan, and Haryana. Their brand identity is anchored on engineering excellence, extensive green integration, and delivering optimal carpet space value for middle-to-high-income families.

unit_types.name: 2 BHK + 2T (Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 2 BHK overlooking central lawns
unit_types.description: A well-ventilated, three-side-open 2 BHK configuration maximizing raw usable carpet space, featuring broad balconies oriented for morning sunlight.
whats_included: Elegant ceramic tiles in drawing and dining zones
Concealed copper wiring with ISI-marked modular switches

unit_types.name: 3 BHK + 3T (Premium)
unit_types.subtitle: Elite Family 3 BHK
unit_types.description: Spacious three-bedroom apartment with 3 wide balconies looking out directly onto Noida's 50-acre master green park.
whats_included: Vitrified flooring across bedrooms and kitchens
Laminated wooden floorboards in master bedroom
Premium ISI W.C. and washbasin fittings
Double-bowl deep stainless steel kitchen sink

unit_types.name: 4 BHK + 4T + Servant (Grande)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 4 BHK with servant quarters
unit_types.description: A majestic four-bedroom layout with a dedicated servant suite, massive walk-in closets, and expansive balconies facing the adjacent botanical reserve.
whats_included: Premium polished flooring and high-end bathroom sanitary ware
Italian marble cladding accents in formal drawing areas
Fully modular luxury kitchen platform with modern chimney ducting
Private elevator foyer access on select towers

connectivity.notes: Quick 10-12 minutes walk or 3-minute auto ride

connectivity.name: 50-Acre Master City Park Noida
connectivity.notes: Located directly adjacent — premium local green lung

connectivity.name: Manav Rachna International School Sector 75
connectivity.notes: Highly trusted school in the neighboring block

assumptions: Resale transactions reflect the prevailing average circle and secondary market rates for Sector 77 as of Q3 2026.
GST is completely 0% as this is a ready-to-move-in completed development.
Stamp duties and administrative charges follow Noida Authority registration rules.

payment_plan.notes: Registry process completes post bank mortgage clearance and NOC retrieval.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Antriksh Forest represents a highly compelling, low-density ready-to-move-in value purchase in Sector 77 Noida, unique for its immediate proximity to a massive 50-acre city park and very low density of 82 units per acre.
why_buy: Low-Density Privacy: Boasts an incredibly low-density layout (82 units/acre), ensuring uncrowded spaces and premium elevator-to-unit ratios.
Unmatched Botanical Living: Located directly adjacent to a 50-acre city park, yielding fresh air, lower temperatures, and unobstructed green views.
Highly Economical Entry: Priced extremely competitively (₹8,000 - ₹9,500/sqft), offering massive space efficiency for budget-conscious families.
why_avoid: Builder Delivery Legacy: Antriksh Group has historically faced execution delays on other ongoing projects.
Mature Resale Nature: Common areas show standard structural wear and tear as the project was delivered in 2019.
decision_profile.best_for: Growing families seeking maximum indoor space, health-conscious seniors prioritizing green surroundings, and medical professionals wanting integrated clinic features.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Speculative short-term investors or buyers demanding ultra-luxury modern glass facades.

buyerPersonas.headline: Active Health Living next to Botanical Park
reasons: Directly adjacent to Noida's 50-acre city park for clean air and daily morning walks.
Quiet low-density compound with zero traffic noises.

buyerPersonas.headline: Maximum Carpet Area Per Rupee Spent
reasons: Ready 1710 sqft 3 BHK costing significantly less than newer under-construction projects.
Stable active registries with zero Noida Authority title blocks.

riskRadar.description: Completely physical handovers done. Zero construction risk.
Common facilities require persistent AOA upkeep to avoid standard aging wear.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent moderate growth driven by locality maturity and low-density appeal.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly sought-after layout among mid-segment working families due to nearby schools.
investment_insights.market_desc: Steady transactional volume in the secondary resale segment.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Steady liquidation times ranging between 45-60 days.

location_highlights.title: 50-Acre City Park
location_highlights.description: Lush local green lung directly adjacent.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Botanical Corridor
neighborhood_advantages.description: Low-density enclave adjacent to massive government-protected parks.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative (requires immediate ready status with low entry price per sqft)
persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear or joint family with elderly parents and growing children
persona_profile.work_location: Noida / Greater Noida corporate hubs or healthcare clinics
persona_profile.motivation_note: Focused on acquiring expansive carpet area, clean air environment for senior parents, and instant possession to bypass long construction delays.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Antriksh Forest is a highly practical, ready-to-move botanical haven in Sector 77. For buyers prioritizing spacious configurations, low layout density, and instant lifestyle integration over ultra-luxury brand premiums, this project represents exceptional value-for-money.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Residents enjoy a uniquely clean air environment due to direct adjacency to Noida's 50-acre city park. Excellent lift ratios and family-friendly layouts make daily living seamless.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: A defensive capital-preservation asset offering steady rental cash flow and solid physical longevity. Its unique low density protects resale value over the long run.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Perfect for joint families. Children can play in the massive adjacent park, and schools are located within a 5-minute driving radius.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Secures moderate, highly reliable rental yields from corporate executives who prefer a quiet, leafy neighborhood close to transit nodes.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Provides spacious premium configurations with wooden floor master bedrooms and elegant lobbies, though lacking high-end home automation or designer double-skin glass envelopes.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero delivery risk as the society has been fully delivered and inhabited by hundreds of happy families since 2019. Ensure standard resale title verification.
negotiation_leverage: Use minor structural aging signs in some ready towers as leverage to negotiate discounts from sellers.
Highlight competitive prices in older Sector 75 projects to secure best resale rates.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ideal buying window. If an immaculate 3 BHK or 4 BHK is available near ₹8,500/sqft of super area, close the transaction immediately.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Significantly larger apartment sizes and far lower layout density (82 units/acre vs 151 units/acre); direct adjacency to the 50-acre park.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Closer walking distance to Sector 76 metro station; premium construction finishing standards.
competitors.verdict: Express Zenith wins on pure metro proximity and finish; Antriksh Forest wins on lower density, green park access, and spatial value-for-money.
competitors.price_delta_note: Antriksh Forest is approx Rs 1,500/sqft more affordable than Express Zenith.
